Source: AgentForce API References
URL: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/ai/agentforce/references
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Agentforce API References

## Available APIs & SDKs
- Agent API — Communication with AI agents via connected apps and token-based auth
- Agentforce Python SDK — Programmatic agent creation/management via Metadata API
- Models API — Apex classes and REST endpoints connecting to LLMs
- Testing API — Metadata API and Connect API for building/running agent tests
- Agentforce Mobile SDK — Native iOS and Android integration for agent interactions

## Key Features & Tools
- Agent Script — Hybrid language combining natural language with programmatic expressions
- Agentforce DX — Pro-code tools for agent creation/testing outside Builder UI
- Lightning Types — Custom types for complex agent action inputs/outputs
- Citations Reference — Apex classes for programmatic citation support
- Metadata & Tooling APIs — Additional access through existing Salesforce APIs
